rows.label: tev101201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Fortun how to stop the Definia threat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Fortun about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh, very well. If you do exactly
as I ask, I suppose I could tell
you what you wish to know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0002
rows.name:
First, I need you to execute
that traitor, Erio.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0003
rows.name:
She must be made to pay for all of the
countless torments and insults she has
inflicted upon her mother and queen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Then, with great care and proper respect,
you will take me back to my daughters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0005
rows.name:
At that point, I would be
delighted to tell you what
you wish to know. Heh heh heh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0008
rows.name:
I am sure my daughters are quite
busy hunting down and murdering
those responsible for my abduction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Heh. You would be wise to watch
your own back. My daughters
could be disguised as anyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0010
rows.name:
In fact, it is entirely possible that one
of your most trusted and beloved companions
has already been replaced by one of them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0011
rows.name:
How you must regret what you've done! But alas, the die
has already been cast. All you and that traitor Erio
can do now is enjoy what little life you have left![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_SEL2011
rows.name: Try to extract valuable information from Fortun.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Fortun about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0021
rows.name:
I hear that many beaporges can be
found in the West Cinderdunes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0022
rows.name:
...There! Isn't that a useful
piece of information?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0023
rows.name:
As you can see, I am now fully
reformed. So please take me
down from here RIGHT NOW![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0026
rows.name:
Aah! The wind! Please,
[ST:playername ]! You have to save me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0027
rows.name:
I told Erio to take me someplace
that would be fit for a queen...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0028
rows.name:
And she abandoned me up
here! I can't even move![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0029
rows.name:
Even I might not be able to survive
a fall from this height...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0030
rows.name:
Please, you have to get me down
from here! I promise I won't
cause any more trouble for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0031
rows.name: No! Shoo! Do not dare approach me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev101201_MSG0032
rows.name:
Can't you just allow my daughters to
kill you with some measure of grace?[ST:wait ]
